description: Deterministic contract for generating minimal repro receipts from failed RCH proof-lane transcripts without running Cargo or mutating repo state.

non_claims: The receipt chooses minimal repro commands; it does not certify workspace health.
A repro command is not a fresh proof until it is rerun through RCH.
Local fallback evidence remains rejected for remote-required proof lanes.

failures.minimal_repro_command: RCH_REQUIRE_REMOTE=1 rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=${TMPDIR:-/tmp}/rch_target_repro_compile_error CARGO_INCREMENTAL=0 CARGO_PROFILE_TEST_DEBUG=0 RUSTFLAGS='-D warnings -C debuginfo=0' cargo test -p asupersync --test proof_console_report_contract -- --nocapture
failures.why_minimal: The first hard blocker is in one integration contract test; rerunning the whole workspace is unnecessary.
failures.log_excerpt:
error[E0106]: missing lifetime specifier
  --> tests/proof_console_report_contract.rs:67:40
   |
67 | fn field(value: &Value, key: &str) -> &str {
   |                  ------       ----     ^ expected named lifetime parameter
error: could not compile `asupersync` (test "proof_console_report_contract") due to 1 previous error
[RCH] remote vmi1149989 failed (exit 101)

failures.minimal_repro_command: RCH_REQUIRE_REMOTE=1 rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=${TMPDIR:-/tmp}/rch_target_repro_test_assertion CARGO_INCREMENTAL=0 CARGO_PROFILE_TEST_DEBUG=0 RUSTFLAGS='-D warnings -C debuginfo=0' cargo test -p asupersync --test brownout_no_win_lab_e2e optional_brownout_drains -- --exact --nocapture
failures.why_minimal: The failing assertion names one exact test; keep the exact filter and nocapture output.
failures.log_excerpt:
running 1 test
thread 'optional_brownout_drains' panicked at tests/brownout_no_win_lab_e2e.rs:214:9:
assertion `left == right` failed: finalizer drain receipt missing
failures:
    optional_brownout_drains
test result: FAILED. 0 passed; 1 failed; finished in 0.02s

failures.minimal_repro_command: RCH_REQUIRE_REMOTE=1 rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=${TMPDIR:-/tmp}/rch_target_repro_timeout_first_failure CARGO_INCREMENTAL=0 CARGO_PROFILE_TEST_DEBUG=0 RUSTFLAGS='-D warnings -C debuginfo=0' cargo test -p asupersync --test swarm_proof_lane_planner_contract admission_rows_cover_dirty_tree -- --exact --nocapture
failures.why_minimal: The timeout log already contains a first rustc blocker; rerun the named contract test first.

   |
142 |     rows.clone();
   |          ^^^^^ the trait `Clone` is not implemented for `PlannerRow`

failures.minimal_repro_command: RCH_REQUIRE_REMOTE=1 rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=${TMPDIR:-/tmp}/rch_target_repro_enospc CARGO_INCREMENTAL=0 CARGO_PROFILE_TEST_DEBUG=0 RUSTFLAGS='-D warnings -C debuginfo=0' cargo check --all-targets
failures.why_minimal: The command is already the failing all-target compile frontier; the next action is worker health, not a broader local retry.

failures.minimal_repro_command: RCH_REQUIRE_REMOTE=1 rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=${TMPDIR:-/tmp}/rch_target_repro_ssh_transport CARGO_INCREMENTAL=0 CARGO_PROFILE_TEST_DEBUG=0 RUSTFLAGS='-D warnings -C debuginfo=0' cargo test -p asupersync --test formal_proof_posture_contract -- --nocapture

failures.minimal_repro_command: RCH_REQUIRE_REMOTE=1 rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=${TMPDIR:-/tmp}/rch_target_repro_zero_test CARGO_INCREMENTAL=0 CARGO_PROFILE_TEST_DEBUG=0 RUSTFLAGS='-D warnings -C debuginfo=0' cargo test -p asupersync --lib corrected_filter_name -- --exact --nocapture

failures.minimal_repro_command: RCH_REQUIRE_REMOTE=1 rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=${TMPDIR:-/tmp}/rch_target_repro_local_fallback CARGO_INCREMENTAL=0 CARGO_PROFILE_TEST_DEBUG=0 RUSTFLAGS='-C debuginfo=0' cargo clippy --all-targets -- -D warnings
failures.why_minimal: Remote-required clippy should be retried remotely; no local fallback evidence is admissible.

remote required; refusing local fallback
